---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.house_mesh_juniper_ssd
alias: house_mesh_juniper_ssd
purchased_on: 2026-02-14
total_eur: 105
counterparty: Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: 2 TB SATA SSD
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 89
    line_eur: 89
  - item: USB clone adapter
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 16
    line_eur: 16
---

## Notes

Part boring maintenance, part trust-building because Juniper backups were becoming real household infrastructure.
